scope: manual DNS/custom-domain migration plan only; no code edits, no deploy, no Stripe calls, no admin runtime calls, no DB writes
goal: fimamacro.com and www.fimamacro.com should serve the same v1.0.127 public tree currently live at api.fimamacro.com.

manualSteps: For each domain, copy the exact DNS target and record type Render displays.
Do not expose deploy hooks, environment variables, connection strings, or secrets.

dnsValuesRequiredFromRender.fimamacro.com: PLACEHOLDER: use the exact record type and value Render displays for the apex/root domain. Do not guess.
dnsValuesRequiredFromRender.www.fimamacro.com: PLACEHOLDER: use the exact record type and value Render displays for www. Do not guess.

manualSteps: Find existing A record(s) for fimamacro.com pointing to 217.160.0.47.
Find existing AAAA record(s) for fimamacro.com pointing to 2001:8d8:100f:f000::200.
Find existing A/AAAA records for www.fimamacro.com pointing to the same IONOS host, if present.
Remove or replace only the web-hosting records that point root/www to the old IONOS web host.
Add the exact Render-required record for fimamacro.com using the record type and value shown in Render.
Add the exact Render-required record for www.fimamacro.com using the record type and value shown in Render.
Wait for DNS propagation and Render custom-domain verification.

oldRecordsToRemoveOrReplace.action: remove or replace with Render-required apex/root record
remove or replace with Render-required apex/root record

oldRecordsToRemoveOrReplace.value: old IONOS web-hosting target if present
oldRecordsToRemoveOrReplace.action: remove or replace with Render-required www record

recordsToKeep: Any unrelated subdomain records not used for fimamacro.com or www.fimamacro.com web hosting
api.fimamacro.com CNAME to fima-backend-aqmi.onrender.com unless Render explicitly instructs otherwise
doNotDelete: api.fimamacro.com unless deliberately changing the API hostname too

blockerConditions.condition: Render provides a specific apex/root record value that differs from examples or expectations.
blockerConditions.action: Use exactly what Render displays. Do not guess or substitute another target.

blockerConditions.condition: IONOS does not support the Render-required ALIAS/ANAME/CNAME-style record at the apex/root domain.
blockerConditions.action: Use one of the alternatives: make www.fimamacro.com primary and redirect apex to www; move DNS to Cloudflare and use CNAME flattening; or keep IONOS hosting and upload the v1.0.127 public tree there.

blockerConditions.condition: Render custom domain remains unverified after DNS propagation.
blockerConditions.action: Re-check that root/www records exactly match Render's requested record type and value, and that old IONOS A/AAAA records are not still active.

blockerConditions.condition: SSL certificate is pending on Render.
blockerConditions.action: Wait for Render certificate provisioning after domain verification; do not force manual deploy or runtime jobs.

rollbackPlan: If the domain migration fails and the site must be restored quickly, revert the root/www DNS records in IONOS back to the old IONOS web-hosting A/AAAA targets.
Keep email/MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC records unchanged during rollback.
After rollback, fimamacro.com will return to the stale IONOS-hosted website until the v1.0.127 public tree is uploaded there or DNS is moved again.
postChangeVerification: Resolve fimamacro.com and www.fimamacro.com and confirm they no longer point to 217.160.0.47 / 2001:8d8:100f:f000::200.
Check HTTP headers for fimamacro.com and www.fimamacro.com; expect Render-related headers instead of Apache/IONOS.
Verify root/pricing/terms/privacy/success/dashboard show the v1.0.127 website content.
Rerun Priority 2H read-only live website verification.
nextRecommendedStep: Kaan should add fimamacro.com and www.fimamacro.com to Render fima-backend Custom Domains, copy the exact DNS values Render shows, then update only the matching root/www web-hosting DNS records in IONOS.
